form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1800m at this track was 4th-8.4 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Deuce Coupe (2:10.10) in NR 50 to 59 on April 4 at $4. At the start before 4th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Gawler, at the bell was 3rd-4 beaten 3 m by Lochinvar Magic (1:54.50) in NR up to 69 on March 30 at $4.60. Draws the inside so can play a role again.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track beaten 25 m by Deuce Coupe (2:10.10) in NR 50 to 59 on April 4 at $8.40. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:12.70) beating Royal Watch in NR 49 to 56 on March 23 at $2 at the bell was leading 3. Top-four prospects.
